challenge_summary: Pass-9 governance reconciliation found no new concrete stale authority, invalid policy interpretation, missing fail-closed gate, docs/code mismatch, or implied readiness beyond the residual live-execution risks already called out in prior passes. The paired governance JSON records COMPLETE discovery for apex-shared with 6 assignments, 13 blockers, 32 auto-remediations, no required tags, no allowed locations, and no active security exception. The deployment plan and live qualification docs consistently mark provider registration, quota evidence, replacement Entra/OIDC/bootstrap state, GitHub Environment outputs, and workflow dispatch as blocked or pending. The workflow and relevant tests enforce fail-closed checks for exact subscription/config variables, ten-tag project contract, missing or stale security exception, local Gate 4 approval import, stale approval epoch, endpoint cleanup, and CI preview/approval bypass attempts. No Azure calls were made during this review.
